name: Rope Slash : Bow Master
description: Welcome to the most addictive and fun bow and arrow game you’ve ever played on your Android device. Rope Slash is a free arrow shooting game in which you should cut the ropes by shooting arrows while avoid hitting the hanging men. So, if you are looking for a time killer shooting app to challenge your cut rope archery skills and improve your concentration skills, download Rope Slash for free on your Android device and see how many hanged men you can save by shooting the ropes accurately.
instructions: Cut Rope main features at a glance Addictive bow and arrow shooting game Endless challenges with different levels of difficulties More than 50 unique levels with constant updates Easy to learn gameplay yet hard to master
